name: Rusoro Mining Ltd.
description: Rusoro Mining Ltd. is a Canada-based gold mining and exploration company. The company's principal business activities include the acquisition, exploration, development, and operation of gold mineral properties. Rusoro historically operated gold mines in Venezuela, including the Choco 10 and Isidora mines, and is currently engaged in seeking compensation from the Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela for the expropriation of its mining assets through international arbitration.
